bead.title: cleanup: remove duplicate legacy model discovery paths after snapshot routing
bead.description:
CONTEXT
After root ListModels, ResolveRoute, and RouteStatus consume the unified enriched model snapshot, legacy duplicate paths should not remain as accidental alternate sources of truth. The known legacy paths include root `service_models.go` inline model discovery/enrichment helpers and service routing live provider entry/probe helpers that bypass `modelregistry.ModelSnapshot`. Keeping them around risks future changes reintroducing split-brain routing versus `fiz models`.

CHANGE
Delete or quarantine obsolete duplicate discovery/enrichment/routing assembly paths. Keep intentional compatibility surfaces only when they delegate to the unified snapshot path. Examples: deprecated CLI flags may remain if tests require compatibility, but they must call `fiz models`/snapshot-backed code rather than their old discovery implementation.

IN-SCOPE FILES
- service_models.go
- service_routing.go
- agentcli/run.go legacy `--list-models` compatibility wiring if needed
- tests that assert legacy surfaces delegate to the unified path

OUT-OF-SCOPE
- Removing public compatibility flags without a separate contract bead.
- Changing model catalog contents.
- Provider SDK behavior.
bead.acceptance:
1. `rg -n "func discoverAndRankModels|func discoverModelsInline|func listModelsForProvider|func liveProviderEntries|func probeEndpointDiscoveredIDs" service_models.go service_routing.go` returns no matches, or each remaining match is documented by a test proving it delegates to the snapshot assembly path.
2. `go test . ./agentcli ./internal/modelregistry/... ./internal/routing/... -run "ListModels|ResolveRoute|RouteStatus|Snapshot|Models" -count=1` passes.
3. `agentcli` compatibility tests prove any legacy `--list-models` path still emits the same JSON facts as `fiz models --json` for a fixture config/cache.
